name: report_datasheet
full_help:
report_datasheet

Description: 
Report data sheet

Syntax: 
report_datasheet  [-significant_digits <arg>] [-file <arg>] [-append]
                  [-return_string] [-sort_by <arg>] [-name <arg>]
                  [-show_all_corners] [-show_oe_timing] [-group <args>]
                  [-rpx <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                   Description
  ----------------------------------
  [-significant_digits]  Number of digits to display: Range: 0 to 3
                         Default: 3
  [-file]                Filename to output results to. (send output to 
                         console if -file is not used)
  [-append]              Append the results to file, don't overwrite the 
                         results file
  [-return_string]       Return report as string
  [-sort_by]             Sorting order: Values: clock, port
                         Default: clock
  [-name]                Output the results to GUI panel with this name
  [-show_all_corners]    Provide all corners
  [-show_oe_timing]      Show output enable (tristate) timing
  [-group]               List of output ports for skew calculation
  [-rpx]                 Filename to output interactive results to.
  [-quiet]               Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]             Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report, Timing
